title: Signature pocket and threshold destination phase
summary: Lane 3 should spend the next traversal wave on one unforgettable Coastal Scrub pocket and one more memorable high-country threshold destination, keeping authored places ahead of meta-structure.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the coastal scrub signature-pocket traversal handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Coastal Scrub needs one strong physical place players remember by feel.

execution_order.goal: Implement the coastal scrub signature pocket.
execution_order.why_now: A memorable coast-side pocket will keep the front half from feeling like transit.

execution_order.goal: Review the coastal scrub signature pocket.
execution_order.why_now: The new space should feel authored and recoverable, not maze-like.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the high-country threshold destination handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Treeline or tundra should gain one more unforgettable shelter or exposure beat.
The second act should stay memorable in the space itself, not just in route names.
The new beat should increase feel and identity without harshness.

guardrails: Do not add punishing traversal or a larger maze.
Keep the new place inside current route and recovery seams.
Prefer one strong pocket over wider map growth.

main_258_focus.destination_goal: one unforgettable lee pocket, bluff hollow, or windbreak destination that makes the biome feel like a place unto itself
required_traits: distinct from the forest cave or giant-tree family

main_259_focus.destination_goal: one compact mid-snow-meadow drift hold that turns the long meadow between the opener and thaw-skirt into a remembered threshold place
